description: Custom BMad Method workflow variants by HBLAB. Waterfall + TDD lifecycle with D-xx document generation, phase gates, and traceability. Expansion module — requires BMM.
Phase 1 Analysis coordinator. Guides requirements elicitation, glossary creation, and business flow mapping.
Phase 2 Design coordinator. Guides database design, coding standards, and API specification.
Phase 2 Test Design coordinator. Guides test plan creation and test case specification.
Phase 3 Implementation coordinator. Guides task breakdown and TDD implementation.
Phase 4 Testing coordinator. Guides test execution, defect triage, and acceptance decisions.
Generate D-02 Requirements Specification with REQ-xxx IDs and scope boundaries
Generate D-03 Glossary — unified domain terminology from project documents and requirements
Generate D-06 Business Flow Diagram (AS-IS/TO-BE) in Mermaid from PRD and planning artifacts
Generate D-19 Database Design Document with ER Diagram in Mermaid derived from requirements and architecture
Generate D-12 Coding Standards per-project — naming formatting error handling adapted to framework
Generate D-21 API Specification — endpoints and request/response schemas. Optional skill
Generate D-26 Test Plan — strategy scope schedule entry/exit criteria and risk assessment
Generate D-27 Test Specification — detailed test cases with TC-xxx IDs steps and expected results
Break down design artifacts into granular TDD tasks with dependency ordering and test case assignment
Implement code via TDD cycle (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR) per task from the task breakdown
Execute test suites and collect results — classify failures and generate execution report
Final acceptance evaluation — review artifacts and test results for ACCEPTED/REJECTED/DEFERRED/PENDING decision
Validate waterfall phase (1-4) completion against gate checklist. Deterministic + LLM evaluation with PASSED/FAILED report
Create traceability matrix from D-02 REQ IDs. Run once after requirements are finalized
Populate matrix columns (design_ref/code_ref/test_ref/gate_status) as each phase completes
Coverage summary — how many REQ IDs have complete traceability chains
Gap identification and severity classification for missing traceability links
